content.en:
"19 times the immortal power!"

Ye Tian saw that he had compressed 19 times his immortal power, and showed a satisfied smile.

The higher the cultivation, the more difficult it is to compress the immortal power, such as the level of the cosmic god and the master, and it is even more difficult to compress the immortal power or divine power.

And among the great god level, it is more rebellious to be able to compress seven or eight times the immortal power, and it is more difficult for ordinary great gods to even compress twice as much.

And Ye Tian's total immortal power far exceeded that of other great gods, and even far exceeded the immortal power of His Supreme Highness.

Therefore, it was even more difficult for Ye Tian to compress the immortal power.

However, Ye Tian's limit is also higher, and the multiple that can be compressed is naturally far beyond that of others.

This time, with the help of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, he compressed the immortal power by 19 times, which was undoubtedly a very anti-heaven progress, and if he was a child of other universes, he would not be able to do it at all.

"This time I am fortunate to have entered the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, otherwise if I am allowed to slowly compress the immortal power by myself, it will definitely be a long time to compress it to 19 times the immortal power, even more than ten million years!" Ye Tian muttered.

At this time, there was still a little time before leaving the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

Ye Tian was ready to impact 20 times the immortal power, he felt that his immortal power could still be compressed, and there was still hope to impact 20 times the immortal power.

"Try it!"

Ye Tian was accelerated by 1,000 times the time, and he tried his best to compress his immortal power.

Time passes slowly.

this day.

The aura on Ye Tian's body suddenly became stronger, and the immortal power in his body actually glowed with golden brilliance.

"20 times the immortal power!"

Ye Tian opened his eyes, revealing a look of alarm.

Originally, he just wanted to see if he could impact 20 times the immortal power, but he didn't expect to really compress 20 times the immortal power, but he also felt that his immortal power had been compressed to the limit, and there was no way to continue compressing it.

"20x the limit, that's enough!"

Ye Tian thought.

He calculated the time, and at this time, there were still about ten days before leaving the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

With his current level of immortal power, it won't be long before he returns, so he is not in a hurry to return to the entrance.

"It's better to continue to go deeper into the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, I shouldn't be far from the core of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, maybe I can enter the most core place!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he continued to fly slowly towards the head.

After flying for about twenty minutes, Ye Tian was almost at his limit, and at this time, he also came to the core of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian saw a sea of clouds, enveloping this area.

"Gotta get in!"

This thought instantly arose in Ye Tian's mind, and it was difficult to disperse for a long time.

Obviously, this place attracted Ye Tian.

So, Ye Tian forcibly suppressed the restless immortal power in his body and flew another distance.

Finally, Ye Tian reluctantly stepped into the sea of clouds.

But as soon as he entered the sea of clouds, Ye Tian was shocked to find that the suppression had disappeared.

"What's the matter, the sea of clouds is not suppressed by the Spirit Cloud Heavenly Realm!"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

Soon, something even more surprising happened.

Countless liquid substances in the sea of clouds poured into Ye Tian's body, this was the energy body that belonged to the sea of clouds, and it was also one of the components of the sea of clouds.

With the influx of these energies, Ye Tian's immortal power, which had already reached its limit, was actually absorbing these energies again, and began to change slowly.

The immortal power that was originally glowing with golden brilliance actually began to transform into real golden immortal power, and the immortal power became more and more pure and powerful.

21 times!

22 times!

......

The immortal power, which was originally limited to 20 times the limit, continued to compress, making Ye Tiandu stunned.

He didn't even take the initiative to compress the immortal power, but the immortal power was actively compressed under the influx of the energy of the sea of clouds.

"Opportunity!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he absorbed these energies with all his strength, compressing the immortal power in his body.

Suddenly, the speed of immortal force compression was much faster.

Under the 1,000 times time compression, Ye Tian was immersed in the compression of immortal power, and he didn't know how long it had been.

Suddenly, one day.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and stopped compressing the immortal power.

At this time, the immortal power in his body had already turned into half-gold, and the degree of compression had reached 36 times the immortal power.

"36 times the immortal power, the energy of this sea of clouds is also ineffective for me, I'm afraid that in the future of Gu Pill, I am the only one who can reach 36 times the immortal power!" Ye Tian muttered.

He calculated the time and found that there were only three days left before the Lingyun Heavenly Realm was closed.

"Gotta leave!"

Ye Tian flew out of the sea of clouds and quickly flew towards the exit of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

......

The entrance and exit of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

One by one, the great gods came out of it, and the Celestial Venerables of the Spirit Race and other Universe Great Clans looked at the exit one by one, and once all the great gods of their race came out, they took them away and left.

Soon.

Eagle Zhan Daozi and other five great gods came out one after another, and other great gods also appeared one after another.

"Hasn't His Highness Wanfa come out yet?"

Eagle Zhan Daozi glanced around and said.

"There is still some time, it is estimated that His Highness Wanfa wants to cultivate a little longer!"

Another Terran Great Shinto.

"Well, I guess so!"

Eagle Zhan Daozi nodded.

After another period of time, when there were only twenty hours left before the Spirit Cloud Heavenly Realm, a figure walked out of the portal in the air.

This person is Ye Tian, His Highness of Ten Thousand Laws!

Swish!

Ye Tian teleported to Ying Zhan Daozi and the others, and said, "I'm back!"

"Then let's leave!"

Eagle Battle Daozi Dao.

Subsequently, the Terran Tianzun picked up Ye Tian and the other six people, and left the Spirit Clan in a spaceship.

A few days later.

Ye Tian returned to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

After resting for a few days, Ye Tian was ready to attack the galaxy level.

However, before he could hit the galaxy level, he wanted to meet the Kunwu Supreme.

After all, his impact on the galaxy level is a big deal for the Terrans, and it is also a big deal for the Terran Supreme Palace.

Once he became a galaxy-level powerhouse, he was no longer a highness in the supreme hall of the human race.

He originally wanted to help the human race compete for more honors at the Great God level, but his growth rate was too fast, and if he continued to stay at the Great God level, it would undoubtedly delay his cultivation.

Besides, once he becomes a galaxy-level, how to take the next path, Kunwu Supreme may have good advice.

Ye Tian first mentioned it to the Dark Lord, and the Dark Lord informed the Kunwu Supreme.

Subsequently, the Kunwu Supreme summoned Ye Tian.

Kungo Temple.

Ye Tian and Kunwu Supreme met alone.

"Ye Tian, do you really want to impact the galaxy level? Do you want to accumulate any more foundations, the more the great god-level foundation accumulates, the more benefits you will get from impacting the galaxy level!"

Kunwu Supreme Persuaded.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Kunwu Supreme, I have already accumulated to the extreme, there is no need to continue to accumulate!"

"Extreme?" Kunwu Supreme smiled and said, "How many times has your immortal power been compressed, and to what extent has your soul been raised?"

"The immortal power is compressed 36 times! As for the soul, it has reached the ninth level!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"What !!"

The Kunwu Supreme was shocked and completely incredulous.

The immortal power is compressed by 36 times, what is the probability of this, there is this multiple of immortal power.

As for the ninth-level soul, he may not have known it before, but Ye Tian contributed the Hades Secret Codex, which made him better understand the level of the soul, and the ninth-level soul was even more terrifying than many cosmic gods and even the dominant souls!

"What you said is true?"

Kunwu Supreme asked with some disbelieving.

"Really!"

Ye Tian was extremely sure, and the immortal power that was about to be projected out, and the half-golden immortal power flowing in his body was full of majestic and powerful power, far surpassing the immortal power and divine power of other great gods.

And Ye Tian also showed the means of soul out-of-body, a powerful soul body walked out of the soul sea, and the powerful soul made the surrounding void tremble, and even made the Kunwu Supreme have an illusion that Ye Tian's soul was not weaker than him.

That's not possible, though!

The total amount of supreme-level souls may not be high, but the quality is very high, and the total amount of Ye Tian's souls is still high, but the quality is still much worse than that of the supreme soul.

"Okay, good, you can go to the galaxy level, I won't stop you!"

Kunwu Supreme said with relief!
